steps.title: Set up the ratio
steps.content:
"What percent of $x$" means we compare $0.23x$ to $x$ as a fraction, then multiply by $100\%$:
$$\frac{0.23x}{x} \times 100\%$$

steps.title: Simplify and compute
steps.content:
The $x$ cancels in the numerator and denominator:
$$0.23 \times 100\% = 23\%$$
So $0.23x$ is $23\%$ of $x$, which matches A.
